summary: The diff correctly updates the WhatsAppButton.tsx component with the exact href URL specified in REQ-21. The floating button now links to 'https://wa.me/918429145707?text=Hi%20MEDANTA%20CARE%2C%20I%20want%20to%20place%20an%20order', opens in a new tab, and no other files besides WhatsAppButton.tsx (and metadata files) were modified. All acceptance criteria for REQ-21 appear to be met.
